question_tagalog: Anong paborito mong part ng araw natin tuwing magkasama tayo?
question_english: What's your favorite part of our day whenever we're together?
quote_tagalog: Ang paborito kong oras ay ang oras na kasama kita.
quote_english: My favorite time is the time I spend with you.

question_tagalog: Kailan mo na-realize na gusto mo pala talaga ako?
question_english: When did you realize that you actually really like me?
quote_tagalog: Hindi ko alam kung kailan, basta isang araw ikaw na lang.
quote_english: I don't know when, just one day it was you.

question_tagalog: Ano yung first impression mo sakin nung una tayong magkita?
question_english: What was your first impression of me when we first met?
quote_tagalog: Sino ba namang mag-aakala na ikaw pala ang para sakin.
quote_english: Who would have thought that you are the one for me.

question_tagalog: Anong maliit na bagay ang ginagawa ko na nagpapakilig sayo?
question_english: What small thing do I do that gives you butterflies?
quote_tagalog: Sa mga simpleng ngiti mo, buo na ang araw ko.
quote_english: With your simple smiles, my day is complete.

question_tagalog: Kung bibigyan kita ng isang award, anong award yun?
question_english: If I were to give you an award, what award would it be?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw ang pinakamagandang premyo ko sa buhay.
quote_english: You are my most beautiful prize in life.

question_tagalog: Ano yung palagi mong namimiss sakin pag hindi tayo magkasama?
question_english: What do you always miss about me when we're apart?
quote_tagalog: Kahit kalalayo lang natin, miss na agad kita.
quote_english: Even though we just parted, I miss you already.

question_tagalog: Anong kanta ang nag-papaalala sayo tungkol sakin?
question_english: What song reminds you of me?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw ang paborito kong musika.
quote_english: You are my favorite music.

question_tagalog: Saan mo gustong pumunta tayo for our next anniversary?
question_english: Where do you want us to go for our next anniversary?
quote_tagalog: Kahit saan, basta ikaw ang kasama ko.
quote_english: Anywhere, as long as I'm with you.

question_tagalog: Anong word ang best na nag-describe sa relationship natin ngayon?
question_english: What word best describes our relationship right now?
quote_tagalog: Tayo ang paborito kong kwento.
quote_english: We are my favorite story.

question_tagalog: Ano ang paborito mong physical feature ko?
question_english: What is your favorite physical feature of mine?
quote_tagalog: Walang kakupas-kupas ang ganda mo sa paningin ko.
quote_english: Your beauty never fades in my eyes.

question_tagalog: Pano mo nalaman na ako na yung 'the one' para sayo?
question_english: How did you know that I am 'the one' for you?
quote_tagalog: Sinabi ng puso ko na dito na ako titigil.
quote_english: My heart told me this is where I'll stop.

question_tagalog: Anong habit ko ang pinaka nakakatawa para sayo?
question_english: Which of my habits is the funniest to you?
quote_tagalog: Kahit anong weird mo, mahal pa rin kita.
quote_english: No matter how weird you are, I still love you.

question_tagalog: Kung gagawa tayo ng rule sa bahay, anong rule ang ipapatupad mo?
question_english: If we were to make a house rule, what rule would you implement?
quote_tagalog: Rule number one: Bawal matulog nang magkaaway.
quote_english: Rule number one: Never go to sleep mad at each other.

question_tagalog: Anong favorite memory mo nung nagdi-date pa lang tayo?
question_english: What's your favorite memory from when we were still just dating?
quote_tagalog: Kay sarap balikan ng ating mga unang kilig.
quote_english: It's so nice to look back at our first thrills.

question_tagalog: Ano ang unang napapansin mo sakin pag bad mood ako?
question_english: What do you first notice about me when I'm in a bad mood?
quote_tagalog: Kahit nakasimangot ka, cute ka pa rin sakin.
quote_english: Even when you frown, you're still cute to me.

question_tagalog: Paano ginagawa yung the best hug para sayo?
question_english: How is the best hug for you done?
quote_tagalog: Yakap mo ang nagtatanggal ng pagod ko.
quote_english: Your hug takes away my tiredness.

question_tagalog: Anong nickname ko para sayo ang pinaka gusto mo?
question_english: Which of my nicknames for you do you like the most?
quote_tagalog: Ang pangalan mo ang paborito kong banggitin.
quote_english: Your name is my favorite to say.

question_tagalog: Ano yung bagay na ginawa ko sayo na hindi mo ine-expect?
question_english: What was a thing I did for you that you didn't expect?
quote_tagalog: Lagi mo akong ginugulat sa pagmamahal mo.
quote_english: You always surprise me with your love.

question_tagalog: Gusto mo ba usually ng surprise date o planned date natin?
question_english: Do you usually prefer our surprise date or planned date?
quote_tagalog: Kahit anong plano, basta matuloy lang tayo.
quote_english: Whatever the plan is, as long as we push through.

question_tagalog: Ano ang feeling mo nung unang beses mo kong makausap?
question_english: How did you feel the first time you talked to me?
quote_tagalog: Kinabahan ako kasi iba ang naramdaman ko sayo.
quote_english: I was nervous because I felt something different for you.

question_tagalog: Ano yung the best advice natin sa isa't isa as a couple?
question_english: What is our best advice to each other as a couple?
quote_tagalog: Laging piliing mag-usap kaysa mag-away.
quote_english: Always choose to talk rather than fight.

question_tagalog: Pano mo ko ico-comfort after a very long tiring day sa work?
question_english: How would you comfort me after a very long tiring day at work?
quote_tagalog: Ako ang pahinga mo pagkatapos ng mahabang araw.
quote_english: I am your rest after a long day.

question_tagalog: Ano yung nakikita mong difference ko sa ibang naging kakilala mo?
question_english: What difference do you see in me compared to others you've met?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw lang ang nag-iisang nagpatibok ng puso ko nang ganito.
quote_english: You are the only one who made my heart beat like this.

question_tagalog: Kapag nagkukulitan tayo, anong paborito mong asar sakin?
question_english: When we joke around, what's your favorite way to tease me?
quote_tagalog: Pikon ka man minsan, mahal na mahal naman kita.
quote_english: Even if you're easily annoyed sometimes, I love you so much.

question_tagalog: Anong movie ang feeling mo tayo yung bida?
question_english: Which movie do you feel we are the main characters of?
quote_tagalog: Ang istorya natin ay higit pa sa pelikula.
quote_english: Our story is greater than a movie.

question_tagalog: Paano mo nilalambing yung sarili mo sakin pag gusto mong magpalambing?
question_english: How do you act sweet to me when you want to be pampered?
quote_tagalog: Kahit hindi ka magsalita, alam kong gusto mo ng lambing.
quote_english: Even without speaking, I know you want sweetness.

question_tagalog: Ano yung pagkain na lagi kitang naaalala pag kinakain ko?
question_english: What food always reminds me of you when I eat it?
quote_tagalog: Ang pag-ibig, parang paboritong pagkain, hindi nakakasawa.
quote_english: Love is like a favorite food, it never gets tiring.

question_tagalog: Kung magiging emoji ako, anong emoji ako at bakit?
question_english: If I were an emoji, what emoji would I be and why?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw ang smiley face sa bawat malungkot kong araw.
quote_english: You are the smiley face on my every sad day.

question_tagalog: Saan mo unang naisip na 'Gusto ko siyang makasama habangbuhay'?
question_english: When did you first think 'I want to be with him/her forever'?
quote_tagalog: Habangbuhay ay hindi sapat para mahalin kita.
quote_english: Forever is not enough to love you.

question_tagalog: Ano yung ginagawa ko na palaging nagpapangiti sayo ng palihim?
question_english: What do I do that always makes you smile secretly?
quote_tagalog: Kahit walang dahilan, napapangiti mo ako.
quote_english: Even without reason, you make me smile.

question_tagalog: Ano yung topic na paborito mong pinag-uusapan natin bago matulog?
question_english: What is your favorite topic we talk about before sleeping?
quote_tagalog: Paborito kong kausap ang paboritong tao ko.
quote_english: My favorite person to talk to is my favorite person.

question_tagalog: Bakit feeling mo nag-click talaga tayong dalawa agad?
question_english: Why do you feel we completely clicked right away?
quote_tagalog: Parang matagal na tayong magkakilala simula pa nung una.
quote_english: It feels like we've known each other for a long time since the start.

question_tagalog: Anong word ang lagi kong sinasabi na nakuha mo na rin?
question_english: What word do I always say that you've picked up too?
quote_tagalog: Nahahawa na tayo sa isa't isa.
quote_english: We're already rubbing off on each other.

question_tagalog: Paano mo ako dine-describe sa mga friends mo nung una?
question_english: How did you describe me to your friends at first?
quote_tagalog: Proud akong ipagmalaki ka sa buong mundo.
quote_english: I'm proud to show you off to the whole world.

question_tagalog: Anong talent ko ang natutuwa ka kapag ginagawa ko?
question_english: Which talent of mine makes you happy when I do it?
quote_tagalog: Susuportahan kita sa lahat ng gusto mong gawin.
quote_english: I will support you in everything you want to do.

question_tagalog: Kung bibigyan tayo ng free trip for one day, saan tayo pupunta?
question_english: If we were given a free trip for one day, where would we go?
quote_tagalog: Basta magkasama tayo, magiging masaya ang byahe.
quote_english: As long as we're together, the trip will be fun.

question_tagalog: Ano yung pinaka-cute na reaction ko kapag inaasar mo ako?
question_english: What is my cutest reaction when you tease me?
quote_tagalog: Ang sarap mong inisin kasi ang cute mo mainis.
quote_english: It's fun to annoy you because you're cute when annoyed.

question_tagalog: Saan tayo pinaka-magaling as a team or as a couple?
question_english: Where are we best at as a team or as a couple?
quote_tagalog: Tayo ang magkakampi sa lahat ng laban.
quote_english: We are allies in every battle.

question_tagalog: Ano yung bagay na pareho tayo ng gusto na hindi mo inexpect?
question_english: What's a thing we both like that you didn't expect?
quote_tagalog: Kahit magkapareho o magkaiba, tanggap natin ang isa't isa.
quote_english: Alike or different, we accept each other.

question_tagalog: Paano mo sine-save yung contact name ko sa phone mo mula noon hanggang ngayon?
question_english: How have you saved my contact name in your phone from before until now?
quote_tagalog: Espesyal ka pati sa phone book ko.
quote_english: You're special even in my phone book.

question_tagalog: Kung may superpower tayong dalawa na pwedeng i-combine, ano yun?
question_english: If we had two superpowers we could combine, what would it be?
quote_tagalog: Love natin ang pinakamalakas na kapangyarihan.
quote_english: Our love is the strongest power.

question_tagalog: Ano yung gift ko na hindi mo ine-expect pero sobrang na-appreciate mo?
question_english: What gift of mine didn't you expect but appreciated so much?
quote_tagalog: Ang pinakamagandang regalo ay yung nasa puso.
quote_english: The best gift is the one in the heart.

question_tagalog: Paano mo tinitingnan yung pictures natin nung bago pa lang tayo?
question_english: How do you view our pictures from when we were just starting?
quote_tagalog: Tingnan mo kung paano tayo nag-grow, together.
quote_english: Look at how we grew, together.

question_tagalog: Saang bagay kita laging naaalala at the middle of the day?
question_english: In what thing do you always remember me in the middle of the day?
quote_tagalog: Lagi kang sumasagi sa isip ko araw-araw.
quote_english: You always cross my mind every day.

question_tagalog: Ano yung quality ko na sana hindi magbago kahit tumanda pa tayo?
question_english: What quality of mine do you hope won't change even as we grow old?
quote_tagalog: Mananatili ang pag-ibig ko kahit pumuti na ang buhok natin.
quote_english: My love will remain even when our hair turns white.

question_tagalog: Kung magsasama tayo sa isang abandoned island, sino ang tagahanap ng food?
question_english: If we're together on an abandoned island, who is the food finder?
quote_tagalog: Teamwork makes the dream work para sa atin.
quote_english: Teamwork makes the dream work for us.

question_tagalog: Anong outfit ko ang mas bet mo? Pang-bahay or pang-alis?
question_english: Which outfit of mine do you prefer? Home clothes or going-out clothes?
quote_tagalog: Kahit naka-pajama ka lang, ang ganda/gwapo mo pa rin sakin.
quote_english: Even just in pajamas, you're still beautiful/handsome to me.

question_tagalog: Ano yung palagi nating ginagawa na sana hindi natin ihinto kailanman?
question_english: What do we always do that you hope we never stop?
quote_tagalog: Tuloy-tuloy lang ang pag-ibig, walang preno.
quote_english: Love just keeps going, no brakes.

question_tagalog: Kapag nagkakatitigan tayo bigla tapos natatawa, anong iniisip mo nun?
question_english: When we suddenly stare at each other and laugh, what are you thinking then?
quote_tagalog: Minsan nagkaka-intindihan tayo sa tingin pa lang.
quote_english: Sometimes we understand each other just through a look.

question_tagalog: Anong word of endearment ang pinaka-corny pero gustong-gusto mo pag ako nagsabi?
question_english: What term of endearment is the corniest but you love it when I say it?
quote_tagalog: Corny na kung corny, mahal naman kita.
quote_english: Corny if it's corny, but I love you.

question_tagalog: Ano yung in-effort ko for you na hinding-hindi mo malilimutan?
question_english: What effort did I do for you that you will never forget?
quote_tagalog: Ang effort mo ay tanda ng pagmamahal mo.
quote_english: Your effort is a sign of your love.

question_tagalog: Kung may soundtrack ang lovelife natin, ano ang chorus?
question_english: If our lovelife had a soundtrack, what is the chorus?
quote_tagalog: Aawitin ang kanta ng ating pag-ibig.
quote_english: Will sing the song of our love.

question_tagalog: Paano ginagawa yung the perfect date night para sayo ngayon?
question_english: How is the perfect date night done for you right now?
quote_tagalog: Ang perfect date ay yung tayo lang namang dalawa.
quote_english: The perfect date is just the two of us.

question_tagalog: Sino satin ang mas malamang na makalimot sa anniversary o monthsary?
question_english: Who among us is more likely to forget an anniversary or monthsary?
quote_tagalog: Araw-araw kitang ipinapagdiwang.
quote_english: I celebrate you every day.

question_tagalog: Ano yung bagay na binago mo sa sarili mo dahil sakin (in a good way)?
question_english: What is a thing you changed about yourself because of me (in a good way)?
quote_tagalog: Dahil sayo, naging better version ako ng sarili ko.
quote_english: Because of you, I became a better version of myself.

question_tagalog: Kapag nalulungkot ako, anong unang instinct mong gawin?
question_english: When I am sad, what is your first instinct to do?
quote_tagalog: Nandito ako para saluhin ang lungkot mo.
quote_english: I am here to catch your sadness.

question_tagalog: Anong klaseng kwento ang ibibida natin tungkol sa love story natin someday?
question_english: What kind of story will we brag about our love story someday?
quote_tagalog: Ang kwento natin ay pang-habambuhay.
quote_english: Our story is for a lifetime.

question_tagalog: Saang part ng bahay mo ko gustong kasama mag-chill pag weekends?
question_english: Which part of the house do you want to chill with me on weekends?
quote_tagalog: Kahit saang sulok, basta katabi kita magpahinga.
quote_english: In any corner, as long as I rest beside you.

question_tagalog: Bakit feeling ko minsan, mas kilala mo na ako kaysa sa sarili ko?
question_english: Why do I feel sometimes, you know me better than I know myself?
quote_tagalog: Kilala kita, sa bawat ngiti at bawat luha.
quote_english: I know you, in every smile and every tear.

question_tagalog: Handa ka na bang gumawa ng mas maraming memories pa kasama ako?
question_english: Are you ready to make even more memories with me?
quote_tagalog: Handang-handa na para sa habambuhay nating dalawa.
quote_english: Very ready for our lifetime together.
